case_title: JAMES HYLAND VS. CLEAN POWER FINANCE, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO CLEAN POWER FINANCE, INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF JAN-14-2016 AT 3:30 PM. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $773.52 FILED BY TREDEGAR SOLAR FUND I LLC AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT HYLAND, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-14-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT TREDEGAR SOLAR FUND I LLC RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT HYLAND, JAMES $298.52 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $328.52 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
